queries.question: Show me the themes each hotel uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Themes.theme_name  from Boutique_Hotels_Themes join Themes on Boutique_Hotels_Themes.theme_id = Themes.theme_id join Boutique_Hotels on Boutique_Hotels_Themes.boutique_hotel_id = Boutique_Hotels.hotel_id   GROUP BY Boutique_Hotels_Themes.theme_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Boutique_Hotels_Themes.boutique_hotel_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Boutique_Hotels)

queries.question: Show me the themes each hotel uses.
queries.sql: select boutique_hotels.name , themes.theme_name from Boutique_Hotels_Themes join Themes on Boutique_Hotels_Themes.theme_id = Themes.theme_id join Boutique_Hotels on Boutique_Hotels_Themes.boutique_hotel_id = Boutique_Hotels.hotel_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?theme_name WHERE {
  ?boutique_hotels_themes a :Boutique_Hotels_Themes .
  ?themes a :Themes .
  ?boutique_hotels_themes p:hasThemes ?themes .
  ?boutique_hotels a :Boutique_Hotels .
  ?boutique_hotels_themes p:hasBoutique_Hotels ?boutique_hotels .
  ?boutique_hotels p:name ?name .
  ?themes p:theme_name ?theme_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the themes each hotel uses.
